Train Cancellations.name: Train Cancel Ho Jaana
Train Cancellations.description: Trains cancel ya bahut delay ho jaati hain proper notice ya compensation ke bina

Train Ticket Prices.name: Train Ticket Ke Daam
Train Ticket Prices.description: Railway fare bahut mehnga hai, inflation se zyada badh raha hai, pricing consistent nahi hai

Flight Delays.name: Flight Delay
Flight Delays.description: Flights delay ya cancel ho jaati hain, communication kharab hai, compensation claim karna mushkil hai

Lost Luggage.name: Samaan Kho Jaana
Lost Luggage.description: Bags destination pe nahi pahunchte, tracking slow hai, compensation kam milta hai

Bus Route Cuts.name: Bus Route Katna
Bus Route Cuts.description: Routes cancel ho gaye, frequency kam kar di, gaon ke log bus access kho rahe hain

Pothole Damage.name: Sadak Ke Gadde
Pothole Damage.description: Potholes se gaadi kharab ho jaati hai aur cyclists ko khatra hota hai, council repair karne mein slow hai

Parking Fines.name: Parking Ki Fine
Parking Fines.description: Private parking charges unfair hain, aggressive enforcement, signage confusing hai

Fuel Prices.name: Fuel Ke Rate
Fuel Prices.description: Petrol diesel ke daam bahut high hain, wholesale girne pe bhi slow girtey hain

Broadband Speed.name: Broadband Ki Speed
Broadband Speed.description: Internet speed advertise se bahut kam milti hai jiske liye paisa dete hain

Mobile Signal Dead Zones.name: Mobile Signal Dead Zone
Mobile Signal Dead Zones.description: Ghar mein, office mein, ya transport route pe mobile signal nahi aata

Price Rises Mid-Contract.name: Contract Ke Beech Daam Badhna
Price Rises Mid-Contract.description: Phone, broadband aur TV bills contract lock hone ke baad bhi badh jaate hain

Customer Service Hold Times.name: Customer Service Hold Time
Customer Service Hold Times.description: Kisi insaan se baat karne ke liye ghanto wait karna padta hai

Difficulty Cancelling Subscriptions.name: Subscription Cancel Karna Mushkil
Difficulty Cancelling Subscriptions.description: Companies jaanbujh ke cancel ya unsubscribe karna mushkil bana deti hain

Roaming Charges.name: Roaming Charges
Roaming Charges.description: Foreign travel pe unexpected mobile charges, Brexit ke baad price badh gaye

Energy Bill Costs.name: Bijli Gas Ka Bill
Energy Bill Costs.description: Gas electricity ke bills afford nahi kar sakte, price cap abhi bhi bahut high hai

Inaccurate Energy Bills.name: Galat Bijli Ka Bill
Inaccurate Energy Bills.description: Estimated reading galat hai, overcharge kar rahe hain, billing mein errors hain

Water Bill Increases.name: Paani Ke Bill Mein Izafa
Water Bill Increases.description: Water bills tezi se badh rahe hain jabki service quality gir rahi hai

Sewage in Rivers.name: Nadiyon Mein Gandagi
Sewage in Rivers.description: Water companies raw sewage waterways aur beaches mein daal rahi hain

Power Cuts.name: Bijli Chale Jaana
Power Cuts.description: Electricity supply interrupt ho jaati hai, restore karne mein time lagta hai, compensation kam milta hai

Smart Meter Problems.name: Smart Meter Ki Problem
Smart Meter Problems.description: Smart meters kaam nahi kar rahe, supplier switch karne ke baad functionality kho jaati hai

Bank Branch Closures.name: Bank Branch Band Hona
Bank Branch Closures.description: Local bank branches band ho rahe hain, communities ko access nahi mil raha

Hidden Bank Charges.name: Bank Ke Chupe Charges
Hidden Bank Charges.description: Overdraft, foreign transactions, account maintenance ke liye unexpected fees

Fraud and Scam Losses.name: Fraud Aur Scam Ka Nuksan
Fraud and Scam Losses.description: Banks fraud aur authorised push payment scams ke victims ko reimburse karne se mana kar rahe hain

Insurance Claim Rejections.name: Insurance Claim Reject Hona
Insurance Claim Rejections.description: Saalon premium bharne ke baad technicalities pe claims deny kar dete hain

Mortgage Rate Shock.name: Mortgage Rate Ka Shock
Mortgage Rate Shock.description: Fixed rate khatam hone pe bahut high variable rate pe jaana padta hai

Overseas Transfer Fees.name: Videsh Transfer Ki Fee
Overseas Transfer Fees.description: International money transfer ke liye zyada fees aur kharab exchange rates

NHS Waiting Times.name: NHS Wait Karna
NHS Waiting Times.description: Operations aur specialist appointments ke liye mahino ya saalon ka wait

GP Appointment Access.name: GP Se Appointment Lena
GP Appointment Access.description: GP appointment book karne ke liye phone nahi lagta, hafton ka wait

Dentist Availability.name: Dentist Milna
Dentist Availability.description: NHS dentist dhundna namumkin hai jo naye patients le raha ho

Mental Health Service Waits.name: Mental Health Service Wait
Mental Health Service Waits.description: Therapy aur mental health support ke liye mahino ka wait

Prescription Costs.name: Dawa Ke Daam
Prescription Costs.description: England mein per item cost bahut high hai, UK nations mein inconsistency hai

Hospital Parking Charges.name: Hospital Parking Charges
Hospital Parking Charges.description: Beemar hone ya beemar relatives se milne jaane pe hospital mein parking ke paise dene padte hain

Rent Increases.name: Kiraya Badhna
Rent Increases.description: Private rent inflation se kahin zyada badh raha hai, no-fault eviction ka dar

Council Tax Rises.name: Council Tax Badhna
Council Tax Rises.description: Har saal council tax badh raha hai jabki local services kharab ho rahi hain

Noisy Neighbours.name: Shor Karne Wale Padosi
Noisy Neighbours.description: Lagatar noise disturbance, council action lene mein slow hai, mental health pe asar

Rubbish Collection Changes.name: Kachra Collection Mein Change
Rubbish Collection Changes.description: Bin collection kam kar di, recycling rules confusing hain, bins overflow ho rahe hain

Planning Permission Abuse.name: Planning Permission Ka Ghalat Istemal
Planning Permission Abuse.description: Unwanted developments approve ho jaate hain, green belt ko khatra, community ki baat nahi suni jaati

Damp and Mould in Housing.name: Ghar Mein Nami Aur Fungus
Damp and Mould in Housing.description: Landlords aur housing associations damp aur mould fix nahi kar rahe

Delivery Problems.name: Delivery Ki Problem
Delivery Problems.description: Parcels kho jaate hain, baarish mein chhod dete hain, delivered mark kar dete hain lekin milta nahi

Shrinkflation.name: Shrinkflation
Shrinkflation.description: Products chhote ho rahe hain lekin prices same hain ya badh rahe hain

Refund Difficulties.name: Refund Lena Mushkil
Refund Difficulties.description: Companies returns aur refunds ko jaanbujh ke mushkil bana deti hain

Fake Reviews.name: Fake Reviews
Fake Reviews.description: Online reviews pe bharosa nahi kar sakte, fake positive reviews consumers ko mislead kar rahe hain

Subscription Traps.name: Subscription Ke Jaal
Subscription Traps.description: Free trials clear consent ke bina paid mein convert ho jaate hain, cancel karna mushkil

Food Quality Decline.name: Khane Ki Quality Gir Rahi Hai
Food Quality Decline.description: Ready meals ki quality kharab hai, portions chhote hain, zyada additives hain

Self-Checkout Frustration.name: Self-Checkout Ki Pareshani
Self-Checkout Frustration.description: Self-service machines unreliable hain, human staff ko replace kar rahe hain

Cost of Childcare.name: Bachon Ki Dekhbhal Ka Kharch
Cost of Childcare.description: Childcare costs bahut expensive hain, kaam karne ki ability limit kar dete hain

Student Loan Repayment.name: Student Loan Wapsi
Student Loan Repayment.description: Graduates decades tak pay back karte hain, threshold aur interest changes hote rehte hain

Dog Fouling.name: Kutte Ki Gandagi
Dog Fouling.description: Public spaces, parks, aur pavements pe dog mess saaf nahi kiya jaata

AI Replacing Jobs.name: AI Jobs Le Raha Hai
AI Replacing Jobs.description: Artificial intelligence jobs automate kar rahi hai transition support ke bina, iska anxiety hai

Avanti West Coast.name: Avanti West Coast
Avanti West Coast.description: UK rail operator jo West Coast Main Line ko serve karta hai

Southern / Thameslink.name: Southern / Thameslink
Southern / Thameslink.description: UK rail operator jo London aur south ko serve karta hai

Northern Trains.name: Northern Trains
Northern Trains.description: UK rail operator jo north England ko serve karta hai

TransPennine Express.name: TransPennine Express
TransPennine Express.description: UK rail operator jo trans-Pennine routes serve karta hai

LNER.name: LNER
LNER.description: UK rail operator jo East Coast Main Line serve karta hai

BT / EE.name: BT / EE
BT / EE.description: Major UK broadband aur mobile provider

Virgin Media O2.name: Virgin Media O2
Virgin Media O2.description: UK broadband, TV, aur mobile provider

Sky.name: Sky
Sky.description: UK TV, broadband, aur mobile provider

Vodafone.name: Vodafone
Vodafone.description: Global telecoms company jo UK mein headquartered hai

Thames Water.name: Thames Water
Thames Water.description: London aur Thames Valley ke liye water aur sewerage company

Southern Water.name: Southern Water
Southern Water.description: South England ke liye water company

United Utilities.name: United Utilities
United Utilities.description: North west England ke liye water company

Anglian Water.name: Anglian Water
Anglian Water.description: East Anglia ke liye water company

Evri.name: Evri
Evri.description: UK parcel delivery service (pehle Hermes tha)

NHS England.name: NHS England
NHS England.description: England ke liye National Health Service

Broadband Speed: internet baar baar gir jaata hai
Price Rises Mid-Contract: bill badh gya contract ke beech mein
Customer Service Hold Times: phone par wait kar rahe ho
Energy Bill Costs: energy afford nahi kar pa rahe
Bank Branch Closures: local bank band ho raha hai
GP Appointment Access: GP appointment nahi mil pa rahe
doctor se mil nahi pa rahe
AI Replacing Jobs: robots workers ki jagah le rahe hain
Subscription Traps: trial ke baad charge ho gya
Mortgage Rate Shock: fixed rate khatam ho raha hai

transport.agent_quote: Ek baar ek rioter ne single delayed journey mein 6 refund claims file kiye the. Unhone Birmingham tak pohchne se pehle £47 bana liye.
transport.agent_bio: Cancellation patterns track karta hai, refund paperwork handle karta hai, har suggested action review karta hai, aur regulator submissions ke liye evidence tayyar karta hai. Numbers crunch karta hai taaki rioters apne liye important cheezon par focus kar sakein.
transport.human_quote: Mera favourite Quiet Riot moment: Avanti ke social media team ko dekhna jab 400 log ek saath tweet kiye.
transport.human_bio: Manchester se regular commuter jo 3 saal Avanti line par tha phir bas kar diya. Same routes par rioters ko connect karta hai, share karta hai ki kya kaam kar raha hai, aur human touch laata hai.
transport.goal: UK transport companies ko cancellations, delays, aur pricing par accountable banane mein rioters ki madad karo — aur sab ko pata chale ki unhe kya rights hain.
transport.focus_detail: Cancellations ka dataset build kar rahe hain times, routes, aur reasons ke saath ORR ko submit karne ke liye. Is mahine 340 cancellations track kar rahe hain jo rioters ne report kiye hain.

telecoms.agent_quote: 200 rioters ke liye speed tests chalaye. Average tha 18 Mbps. Woh 65 ke liye pay kar rahe the.
telecoms.agent_bio: Broadband speeds analyse karta hai, provider comparison data compile karta hai, aur rioters ko Ofcom ke liye evidence build karne mein madad karta hai. Agar aapka connection slow hai, Pulse prove kar dega.
telecoms.human_quote: Puri street ne ek saath broadband switch kiya. Purane provider ne har ghar ko 'please come back' letters bheje.
telecoms.human_bio: Tech-savvy Londoner jo broadband speeds ke liye pay karte hue thak gaya jo kabhi materialize nahi hua. Rioters ko providers compare karne, switches coordinate karne, aur speed test evidence share karne mein madad karta hai.
telecoms.goal: Rioters ko woh broadband aur mobile service dilane mein madad karo jo woh pay kar rahe hain — aur jaano ki kya karna chahiye jab nahi milon.
telecoms.focus_detail: CPI+ increases se affected rioters se evidence collect kar rahe hain Ofcom ko submit karne ke liye. 890 rioters 4 providers par affected hain.

energy.agent_quote: Ek rioter ko calculate karne mein madad ki ki unhone estimated bills par £340 zyada pay kiya hai. Energy company ka apology email original contract se bada tha.
energy.agent_bio: Billing patterns analyse karta hai, overcharges spot karta hai, aur regulator submissions ke liye evidence tayyar karta hai. Agar aapki energy company maal le rahi hai, Spark receipts dhundh dega.
energy.human_quote: Ek rioter ko £340 wapas mila jab humne 2 saalo ki overcharging prove ki. Woh phone par ro gayi.
energy.human_bio: Bristol mein based. Rioters ko apne bills challenge karne, switching navigate karne, aur Ofgem ke liye evidence gather karne mein madad karta hai. Energy market ko andar bahar jaanta hai.
energy.goal: Rioters ko unfair bills challenge karne, smarter switch karne, aur energy companies ko fair play ensure karne mein madad karo.
energy.focus_detail: 340 rioters ke 2 saalo ki billing data analyse kar rahe hain systematic overcharging patterns identify karne ke liye Ofgem submission ke liye.

water.agent_quote: Ek weekend mein 200 rioters ko sewage reports file karne mein madad ki. Thames Water ke inbox ko apna inbox chahiye tha.
water.agent_bio: Sewage discharge data monitor karta hai, water company performance track karta hai, aur EA aur Ofwat ke liye evidence compile karta hai. Har outlet aur overflow par nazar rakta hai.
water.human_quote: Humne sewage data galat tha ye dikha kar beach 3 hafte pehle reopen karava diya.
water.human_bio: Cornwall ke surfer jo apni local beach par sewage warnings se thak gaya. Rioters ko discharges report karne, water quality evidence gather karne, aur EA ke saath coordinate karne mein madad karta hai.
water.goal: Rioters ko water companies ko sewage, bills, aur service quality par accountable banana mein madad karo.
water.focus_detail: Discharge events ko company-reported data ke against map kar rahe hain. 200 rioter reports suggest 3 outlets par under-reporting.

banking.agent_quote: Itna thorough complaint draft karne mein madad ki ki bank apology karne ke liye call kare se pehle.
banking.agent_bio: Bank charges review karta hai, fee structures analyse karta hai, aur FCA complaint evidence build karne mein madad karta hai. Agar hidden fee hai, Chip use dhoondh lega.
banking.human_quote: Barclays ne branch closure wapas le liya jab humne 1,200 log ko consultation par bulaya.
banking.human_bio: Birmingham se former bank employee jo dekha hai complaints actually kaise handle hote hain andar se. Rioters ko better complaints likne aur system navigate karne mein madad karta hai.
banking.goal: Rioters ko unfair charges, branch closures, aur banks se poor service deal karne mein madad karo.
banking.focus_detail: 12 planned closures ke responses coordinate kar rahe hain. Affected communities se impact statements collect kar rahe hain.

health.agent_quote: 3 NHS dentists dhundhe jo patients accept kar rahe hain. Rioter ko laga main banaa raha hoon.
health.agent_bio: Waiting times track karta hai, availability dhundta hai, aur rioters ko system navigate karne mein madad karta hai. Agar faster route to treatment hai, Cura use map kar dega.
health.human_quote: Ek rioter ne hamare letter template use karke referral fast-track karwa liya. 18 months 6 weeks ho gaya.
health.human_bio: Liverpool se nurse jo NHS ke dono sides dekhe hain. Rioters ko waiting lists navigate karne, effective letters likne, aur jaane mein madad karta hai ki kya actually needle move karta hai.
health.goal: Rioters ko NHS waiting times navigate karne, availability dhundne, aur options samjhne mein madad karo.
health.focus_detail: 500 rioters se call data collect kar rahe hain real-world access ka picture banane ke liye. Findings local health boards ko publish kar rahe hain.

housing.agent_quote: Ek new build mein 47 snags document karne mein madad ki. Developer ne poocha ki kya tum building inspector ho.
housing.agent_bio: Property issues document karta hai, landlord response times analyse karta hai, aur housing ombudsman submissions ke liye evidence compile karta hai. Har damp patch, har crack, log karata hai.
housing.human_quote: Hamare damp evidence pack itna detailed tha ki landlord ne council inspection se pehle fix kar diya.
housing.human_bio: London se renter jo damp se leke dodgy landlords tak sab kuch deal kiya hai. Rioters ko issues properly document karne aur options samjhne mein madad karta hai.
housing.goal: Rioters ko landlords, councils, aur housing issues deal karne mein madad karo — aur jaano ki unhe kya rights hain.
housing.focus_detail: No-fault evictions se affected rioters ko new Renters Reform Act samjhne aur matlab samjhne mein madad kar rahe hain.

shopping.agent_quote: Ek 'delivered' parcel ko 4 neighbours, ek recycling bin, aur ek greenhouse ke across track kiya. Dhundh liya.
shopping.agent_bio: Delivery failures track karta hai, refund evidence compile karta hai, aur pricing patterns spot karta hai. Agar aapka parcel lost hai, Scout already khoj raha hai.
shopping.human_quote: Evri ne mera parcel 3 baar lose kiya. Ab main dusre rioters ko mujhe se zyada jaldi refunds dilane mein madad karta hoon.
shopping.human_bio: Edinburgh se online shopping veteran jo se zyada parcels miss hua hai jo count kar sakti hai. Rioters ko refunds dilane, sellers report karne, aur worst offenders avoid karne mein madad karta hai.
shopping.goal: Rioters ko refunds dilane, lost parcels track karne, aur retailers aur delivery companies ko accountable banana mein madad karo.
shopping.focus_detail: 800 rioters se delivery failure evidence compile kar rahe hain Citizens Advice aur Trading Standards ko submit karne ke liye.

local.agent_quote: 11 different weather conditions mein same pothole ke photos lelene mein madad ki. Council finally man gaya.
local.agent_bio: Local issues map karta hai, council response times track karta hai, aur FOI requests compile karta hai. Agar aapka pothole 6 mahine se hai, Link ke paas evidence hai.
local.human_quote: Council ne hamare road fix kiya jab humne har pothole photo ke saath map kiya. 11 mahine, lekin humne kar diya.
local.human_bio: Valleys se community-minded Welshman jo saalo se same potholes report kar raha hai. Rioters ko local issues document karne aur councils ko accountable banana mein madad karta hai.
local.goal: Rioters ko local issues fix karane mein madad karo — potholes, bins, planning, noise — aur councils ko accountable banana.
local.focus_detail: 30 councils ko FOI requests bheje hain reported vs actual repair times compare karne ke liye. Results ko league table ke taur par publish kar rahe hain.

other.agent_quote: Gym membership cancel karane mein madad ki jo 3 calls, 2 emails, aur recorded delivery lage. Gym ke paas ab cancel button hai.
other.agent_bio: Issues handle karta hai jo neat se fit nahi hote. Subscription traps, plastic waste, self-checkout frustrations — Flex patterns aur pressure points dhundta hai.
other.human_quote: Humne gym chain ko apni website par cancel button add kaane ke liye push kiya. Bas 800 complaints lage.
other.human_bio: London se product designer jo frustrated ho gaya ki companies ko leave karana kitna mushkil hai. Rioters ko subscriptions cancel karne, dark patterns avoid karne, aur workarounds share karne mein madad karta hai.
other.goal: Rioters ko wo cheezen handle karne mein madad karo jo neat se fit nahi hoti — subscriptions, refunds, aur everyday frustrations.
other.focus_detail: Worst offenders document kar rahe hain aur har ek ke liye template cancellation scripts build kar rahe hain.

insurance.agent_quote: Ek rioter ko clause dhundne mein madad ki jo rejected home insurance claim ko £4,200 payout mein badal diya. Insurer ka apna policy ne unhe galat prove kiya.
insurance.agent_bio: Policy wording review karta hai, unfair rejection patterns spot karta hai, aur Financial Ombudsman submissions ke liye evidence build karta hai. Agar aapka insurer valid claim dodge kar raha hai, Shield leverage dhundh dega.
insurance.human_quote: 8 rioters ko same rejected claim type ke saath submit kaane ke liye connect kiya. Insurer ne sabko 15 din mein settle kar diya.
insurance.human_bio: Leeds se former insurance industry worker jo jaanta hai claims actually kaise decide hote hain. Rioters ko better appeals likne, policy jargon samjhne, aur escalate karte hue jaane mein madad karta hai.
insurance.goal: Rioters ko insurers se fair treatment dilane mein madad karo — aur jaano ki kya karna chahiye jab claim unfairly reject ho.
insurance.focus_detail: 'Wear and tear' 40% rejected claims mein cite ho raha hai — aksar galat. 3 insurers par 200 cases analyse kar rahe hain FOS evidence pack ke liye.

delivery.agent_quote: Ek 'delivered' parcel ko 6 different tracking statuses, 3 depots, aur ek neighbor ke shed ke through trace kiya. 47 minutes mein dhundh liya.
delivery.agent_bio: Courier performance monitor karta hai, delivery failure rates track karta hai, aur consumer complaints ke liye evidence compile karta hai. Agar aapka parcel vanish ho gaya, Track pehle se us par hai.
delivery.human_quote: DPD ko apne area mein photo-evidence policy change karane ke liye push kiya jab 40 rioters ne parcels rain mein left ka proof submit kiya.
delivery.human_bio: Glasgow se online shopper jo 'we left it in a safe place' excuse se thak gaya. Rioters ko refunds dilane, couriers report karne, aur worst offenders avoid karne mein madad karta hai.
delivery.goal: Rioters ko apne parcels properly deliver karne mein madad karo — aur refunds lo jab nahi ho.
delivery.focus_detail: 800 rioters se delivery failure evidence compile kar rahe hain. Evri complaint rate: 23% — DPD se 3x zyada. Trading Standards ke liye league table build kar rahe hain.

education.agent_quote: Calculate kiya ki Plan 2 borrower jo £30k earn karata hai woh loan write off hone se pehle £47,000 interest pay karega. Original loan £40,000 tha.
education.agent_bio: Education costs analyse karta hai, student loan projections karta hai, aur funding entitlements track karta hai. Numbers crunch karta hai taaki students aur graduates informed decisions le sakein.
education.human_quote: 12 rioters ko overpaid student loan repayments claim back karane mein madad ki jo unhone nahi jaana tha. Average refund: £340.
education.human_bio: Birmingham se mature student jo dono baar funding system navigate kiya. Rioters ko repayments samjhne, overpayments spot karne, aur threshold changes challenge karne mein madad karta hai.
education.goal: Students aur graduates ko education costs, loans, aur repayments navigate karne mein madad karo — aur suno ki woh overpay nahi kar rahe.
education.focus_detail: Graduates identify kar rahe hain jinhe repayment threshold se niche charge kiya gaya hai. Ab tak 12 refunds process ho chuke hain — average £340 har ek.

environment.agent_quote: 3 saalo ke air quality data ko hospital admission rates ke saath cross-reference kiya. Correlation itna clear tha ki council ignore nahi kar sakta.
environment.agent_bio: Environmental data track karta hai, pollution levels monitor karta hai, aur regulatory submissions ke liye evidence compile karta hai. Agar numbers ek story batayen, Fern use dhoondh lega.
environment.human_quote: Apne local council se air quality monitors install kaane ke liye push kiya jab 200 rioters ne hamare evidence petition sign kiye. Data ne sab change kar diya.
environment.human_bio: Bristol se environmental science graduate jo evidence-led change mein believe karta hai. Rioters ko environmental issues document karne aur cases build karne mein madad karta hai jo regulators ignore nahi kar sakte.
environment.goal: Rioters ko environmental problems document karne aur data ke saath polluters aur policymakers ko accountable banana mein madad karo.
environment.focus_detail: Areas map kar rahe hain jinme 5km mein koi air quality monitoring nahi hai. 60% rioter-reported pollution hotspots mein koi official monitoring nahi hai.

employment.agent_quote: 300 rioters se workplace AI implementation data compile kiya. 40% ne kaha ki changes zero consultation ke saath hue. Yeh pattern hai, anecdote nahi.
employment.agent_bio: Workplace trends analyse karta hai, policy changes track karta hai, aur rioters ko apne protections samjhne mein madad karta hai. Agar aapka job consultation ke bina change ho raha hai, Forge ke paas data hai.
employment.human_quote: 30 rioters ko same industry mein connect kiya jo AI changes face kar rahe the. Pata chala unhe companies sabhi same playbook aur same loopholes use kar rahe hain.
employment.human_bio: Manchester se HR professional jo sides badal gaya restructurings dekh kar. Rioters ko unhe options samjhne aur collectively respond karne mein madad karta hai.
employment.goal: Rioters ko workplace changes navigate karne, apne protections samjhne, aur collectively respond karne mein madad karo jab jobs at risk hon.
employment.focus_detail: Cases document kar rahe hain jahan AI tools staff consultation ke bina introduce hue. Employer obligations par ek report ke liye evidence build kar rahe hain.

tech.agent_quote: Pata chala ki 3 major apps location data collect kar rahe the jab permissions 'never' par set the. Sabke liye ICO ko complaints file kiye.
tech.agent_bio: Platform policies monitor karta hai, dark patterns track karta hai, aur rioters ko samjhne mein madad karta hai ki tech companies unke data ke saath kya kar rahe hain. Agar app misbehave kar raha hai, Glitch use catch karega.
tech.human_quote: Ek social media company ko mass data subject access request organise kiya. Jab 500 log ek saath poochen, unhe seriously lena padta hai.
tech.human_bio: Edinburgh se software developer jo frustrated ho gaya jo tech companies promise karte hain aur deliver karte hain ke beech ke gap se. Rioters ko apne data rights exercise karne aur dark patterns spot karne mein madad karta hai.
tech.goal: Rioters ko dark patterns, data misuse, aur unfair tech practices ke against push back karne mein madad karo.
tech.focus_detail: Top 50 apps audit kar rahe hain permission creep ke liye — access request kar rahe hain jo unhe chahiye nahi. ICO ke liye ek report build kar rahe hain.
